name: perform-font-step-pinch-rewrap
note: Sizing model v3 AUTO-FIT-THEN-WRAP (operator-refined 2026-07-24): the A-/A+ buttons AND a pinch gesture step from the CURRENT EFFECTIVE scale into a manual size, and EVERY size change re-computes the wrap (maxChars at the new size) - never a bare rescale of a stale wrap. The seeded song carries one genuinely long chorus line, so auto-fit opens AT the 0.8 floor (wrapped) and every button/pinch assertion is baseline-relative off the recorded effective scale. Red-first history: (a) v1 stepFont only rescaled (--pscale up, same wrap) so two A+ taps left rows clipping; (b) no pinch handler existed; (c) pinch-in had no 0.8x floor to clamp to; (d) the v2 A- bug stepped from a stale stored value instead of the effective one.

seed.roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1: [{"id":"longLineSong","t":"Long Line Song","a":"Me","y":2026,"d":"Mine","custom":true,"forkOf":"k1","seq":["C","G","Am","F"],"sheet":[["Verse","[C] a short intro line [G] here"],["Chorus","[C]Have you ever seen the [G]rain coming down on a [Am]sunny day watching it all [F]wash away every single one of my [C]dreams from yesterday and the [G]day before that too"]]}]

steps.label: stage open, long line wrapped into >1 row at the default readable size, floor honored
record the baseline: current --pscale and the widest row's character count (chars/row must DROP after a size increase re-wraps)
A+ x2: --pscale rose by ~0.2 from the baseline
A+ x2 RE-WRAPS: no .lyrLine clips at the bigger size (FAILS pre-model: stepFont rescaled the stale wrap and rows ran past the viewport)
A+ x2 RE-WRAPS: the widest row now holds FEWER characters than at the baseline size (the wrap budget was recomputed, not reused)
column alignment survives the button re-wrap
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()

steps.label: PINCH OUT (simulated two-finger spread on the sheet): --pscale grows past the button-set size (FAILS pre-model: no pinch handler, scale unchanged)
after the pinch gesture ends: re-wrapped (no clip) and the new size is PERSISTED to perfprefs.fontScale
PINCH IN hard: the scale CLAMPS at the 0.8x legibility floor - it moves down but never below (FAILS pre-model: no handler, scale never moves)
at the floor: still wrapped with no clip, still column-aligned
